Why Eye Shades

The Difference

👁️
Free Eye Test
Comprehensive eye examination by certified optometrists. Walk in anytime, no appointment needed.
🚚
Same Day Delivery
Order before 2 PM and receive your glasses the same day within Mumbai city limits.
🛡️
1 Year Warranty
Every frame and lens comes with a full 1-year manufacturer warranty. Your investment protected.
↩️
Easy Returns
Not happy? Return within 7 days, no questions asked. Your satisfaction is our priority.
